original: A double set of rather simplistic looking set of obsidian ring piercings that are lined with savicite on the lower half. While archaic in design, they are tipped with savicite, which is a highly sought after commodity. The psionic emissions from the raw jewels will likely leave you feeling a bit randy if worn.
